title: AI Software Engineer – Python (m/f/x)
text:
Job title: AI Software Engineer – Python (m/f/x). Company: Scalable Capital. Focus: Digital investment and banking platform for retail investors
across Europe. Responsibilities: Develop and maintain AI/LLM services for internal and potential client-facing services following software engineering best practices ; Design and develop architectures for deploying and maintaining scalable AI-enabled solutions on AWS ; Extend Terraform infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines to support AI services ; Design and implement testing and monitoring components to ensure accuracy, reliability, and performance of AI-integrated systems ; Build intelligent agentic workflows using orchestration frameworks like LangGraph ; Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI-driven features into the product ; Stay current with latest developments in AI integration, cloud architecture, and scalable backend systems. Use cases: AI-driven financial services for retail investors ; Intelligent agentic workflows for investment and banking operations ; Internal AI-powered tools for operational efficiency ; Client-facing AI services integrated into the Scalable Capital platform ; Automated financial product recommendations and portfolio management support.

title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Agentic AI/Gen AI)
title_canonical: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Agentic AI/Gen AI)
text:
Job title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (Agentic AI/Gen AI). Company: Zscaler. Focus: Zero trust cloud security platform with AI-powered
cybersecurity. Responsibilities: Design and deploy scalable production-grade Gen AI/ML systems from data ingestion to monitoring ; Drive innovation by researching and evaluating emerging AI/ML frameworks and prototyping novel solutions ; Implement and maintain robust MLOps practices including logging, monitoring, and CI/CD pipelines for distributed ML systems ; Lead and mentor junior engineers in system design best practices while promoting technical excellence ; Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate complex business needs into high-impact technical solutions ; Bridge the gap between research and production for AI/ML systems ; Influence technical direction and drive technical excellence across the organization. Use cases: Cyber threat detection and policy violation prevention ; Zero trust security platform automation ; Cloud security intelligence and analysis ; Enterprises productivity enhancement through AI ; Billions of daily threat analysis and response.

title: Principal Software Engineer (Generative AI, Agentic AI, ML models)
title_canonical: Principal Software Engineer (Generative AI, Agentic AI, ML Models)
text: Job title: Principal Software Engineer (Generative AI, Agentic AI, ML models). Company: Zillion Technologies, Inc.. Focus: Global business consulting and technology solutions provider. Responsibilities: Build highly scalable software systems and platforms in cloud environments ; Architect and implement Generative AI solutions, AI Agents, and ML models ; Design elegant technical architectures to solve complex customer problems ; Develop and manage APIs using cloud API gateways, serverless lambdas, and container services ; Implement data persistence solutions using SQL and NoSQL databases ; Mentor team members in designing, developing, and debugging complex software stacks ; Support and resolve production customer escalations with debugging and problem-solving ; Manage full software lifecycle in agile environments. Use cases: Generative AI system development and deployment ; AI Agent design and implementation ; Machine learning model integration into software platforms ; Cloud-native scalable software product development.

title: Associate Director, AI Engineer
text:
Job title: Associate Director, AI Engineer. Company: Dentsu Creative. Focus: Global advertising and media conglomerate providing
marketing and creative services. Responsibilities: Design and build multi-agent systems using LLM orchestration frameworks for client-facing AI products ; Implement end-to-end AI orchestration use cases ensuring reliability, maintainability, and high-quality delivery ; Build agentic wrappers and interfaces around data science models (MMM, forecasting, incrementality) for conversational access ; Configure Genie spaces to enable client data exploration and self-service analytics ; Develop reusable agent components, prompt templates, and tool-use libraries to accelerate future deployments ; Evaluate LLM providers based on capability, cost, and latency and recommend optimal options for each use case ; Write production-grade Python with error handling, observability, CI/CD integration, and deployment automation ; Collaborate with offshore engineering team on architecture direction, design patterns, and coding standards. Use cases: Client-facing conversational AI for marketing analytics and data exploration ; Multi-agent systems for automating advertising and media workflows ; Conversational interfaces for data science models like MMM, forecasting, and incrementality measurement ; Self-service analytics through Genie spaces for client data exploration ; Automated AI-driven workflows transforming data intelligence into actionable insights.

title: AI Engineer (n8n)
text: Job title: AI Engineer (n8n). Company: TechBiz Global. Focus: Recruitment and staffing services for tech clients. Responsibilities: Design, integrate, and automate business processes using AI agents, workflows, and data pipelines with n8n platform ; Lead development and management of workflows utilizing n8n, LLMs, custom ML modeling, vector databases, and Python scripts ; Build and maintain RAG pipelines and Agentic RAG systems ; Collaborate with data engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders to understand automation requirements ; Create and maintain technical documentation for all solutions ; Communicate proactively with local and global teams for seamless project delivery ; Interact with clients for requirement clarification and deployment support. Use cases: Business process automation using AI agents ; Workflow automation and data pipeline integration ; RAG-based information retrieval and question answering systems ; Agentic AI systems for enterprise automation ; Custom ML model integration for business processes.

title: Lead - AI/ML Engineer
text:
Job title: Lead - AI/ML Engineer. Company: nVent. Focus: Electrical connection and protection solutions for
industrial applications. Responsibilities: Guide enterprise agentic AI framework and define integration patterns balancing innovation with governance ; Build, train, validate, and deploy machine learning models using Snowflake ML and AWS services (SageMaker, Bedrock, Lambda) ; Implement generative AI solutions leveraging LLMs, LangChain, and Streamlit for document processing, content generation, and conversational AI ; Develop NLP solutions for text analysis, sentiment detection, entity extraction, and automated classification ; Create computer vision applications for quality inspection, safety monitoring, and document understanding ; Establish MLOps practices including model versioning, monitoring, retraining pipelines, and performance tracking ; Design and implement MCP servers to manage structured context for AI agents ; Work within Snowflake data platform to create vector databases and enable semantic search for generative AI applications. Use cases: Document processing and automated content generation ; Conversational AI and chatbots for enterprise applications ; Knowledge management and semantic search ; Quality inspection and safety monitoring via computer vision ; Text analysis, sentiment detection, and automated classification ; Enterprise agentic AI framework for business process automation.

title: Senior AI Engineer (Rapid Prototyping & Analytics )
text: Job title: Senior AI Engineer (Rapid Prototyping & Analytics ). Company: Prompt Therapy Solutions Inc. Focus: B2B enterprise software for rehab therapy. Responsibilities: Design, build, and deploy end-to-end AI systems across both traditional ML and LLM-based workflows ; Lead AI projects from ideation through architecture to production and iteration ; Design and implement evaluation, monitoring, and observability metrics for accuracy, cost, latency, and business impact ; Build guardrails around LLM pipelines including validation and human-in-the-loop workflows ; Partner with stakeholders across Engineering, Design, Sales, Marketing, Support, Finance, and Operations to understand workflows and deliver practical solutions ; Develop rapid proofs-of-concept and prototypes, then harden them into reliable production systems ; Support both internal AI tools and product-facing AI initiatives as needed ; Help grow and lead the AI team, including training and development of junior team members. Use cases: Speech and language processing applications in healthcare ; Internal AI tools to improve efficiency and decision-making across Engineering, Design, Sales, Marketing, Support, Finance, and Operations ; Product-facing AI solutions for rehab therapy businesses, their teams, and patients ; Automated workflows and business process automation using AI ; Healthcare software enhancements for physical therapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy ; Analytics and dashboards to track AI usage, outcomes, and ROI.

title: Senior AI Engineer II
text:
Job title: Senior AI Engineer II. Company: Porch Group. Focus: Vertical software and insurance platform for homebuyers and
homeowners. Responsibilities: Own the full machine learning lifecycle from research to production, leveraging Computer Vision and NLP techniques to extract insights from unstructured data ; Evaluate and integrate modern AI and foundation model capabilities including vision-language models, embeddings, and retrieval-augmented approaches into production systems ; Partner with product, operations, and engineering to translate business problems into high-impact machine learning or AI opportunities ; Design experiments to quantify the business impact of machine learning models ; Collaborate with other MLEs on tooling improvements for model training and deployment ; Utilize MLOps stack to drive feature engineering, model training, and data analysis ; Write robust, production-grade Python code to productionalize feature engineering, model training, and deployment ; Participate in the on-call rotation to assist engineers in troubleshooting. Use cases: Extract property attributes from text and image data for home and consumer insights ; Computer vision for property image analysis and feature extraction ; NLP-based extraction of property information from unstructured text documents ; Vision-language model applications for home insurance underwriting ; Deriving value from home and consumer data sources for insurance and home services.

title: Staff AI API Engineer
text: Job title: Staff AI API Engineer. Company: SentinelOne. Focus: AI-powered cybersecurity and threat detection. Responsibilities: Develop and maintain high-performance Python-based backend APIs supporting generative and agentic AI products ; Design and implement scalable, secure, and reliable backend architectures using asyncio, FastAPI, gRPC, Kafka, and GraphQL ; Ensure robust data management with relational and NoSQL databases, Redis caching, streaming, and efficient data handling ; Implement and manage secure zero-trust authentication and authorization schemes for public and internal APIs ; Collaborate with frontend engineers, AI researchers, product managers, and DevOps teams to deliver cohesive product experiences ; Optimize backend services for scalability, reliability, and performance in high-availability environments. Use cases: Generative AI products for cybersecurity threat detection and response ; Agentic AI systems that automate security operations ; API-driven access to AI-powered security analysis and threat intelligence ; Real-time security data processing and analysis through streaming APIs ; Secure integration of third-party AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Meta LLaMA) into cybersecurity workflows.

title: AI Sales Engineer
text:
Job title: AI Sales Engineer. Company: Rubrik. Focus: Cyber resilience and AI operations for enterprise data
protection. Responsibilities: Provides technical leadership and direction in developing and positioning Rubrik's AI Agentic Cloud offerings ; Serves as a trusted technology advisor and public cloud subject matter expert to customers and prospects ; Leads technical sales calls, analyzes customer feedback, and identifies market trends ; Qualifies sales opportunities based on technical requirements, competition, and decision-making processes ; Maintains alignment between product roadmap and customer demands through collaboration with product management ; Develops marketing and sales collateral and delivers technical enablement to sales architects and partners ; Drives adoption of cloud native protection technologies across Rubrik and the public cloud ecosystem. Use cases: Cyber resilience and data protection against cyberattacks, malicious insiders, and operational disruptions ; AI agent deployment acceleration with monitoring, auditing, and real-time guardrails enforcement ; Cloud data management, backup, disaster recovery, and data analytics for enterprises ; Secure monitoring and recovery of data, identities, and workloads across cloud environments ; Agentic AI monitoring with fine-tuning for accuracy and ability to undo agentic mistakes.

title: Senior Front-End Engineer (AI Forms Platform)
text:
Job title: Senior Front-End Engineer (AI Forms Platform). Company: Filevine. Focus: Legal AI platform for legal operations and workflow
automation. Responsibilities: Build responsive, high-performance web interfaces for complex form rendering, data entry, and validation using modern JavaScript frameworks ; Collaborate with product designers to translate wireframes into pixel-perfect, accessible user experiences ; Connect front-end components with backend APIs and AI services to display real-time form mapping results and validation errors ; Write unit and integration tests for UI components to ensure defect-free releases ; Optimize application speed and rendering performance for large, multi-page forms ; Use AI-driven development tools to generate boilerplate code, write tests, and troubleshoot styling issues. Use cases: Legal form filling, editing, and filing for lawyers and paralegals ; Complex legal workflow automation ; Real-time form mapping and validation ; AI-first legal operations platform.

title: Data Engineer (AI Platform)
text:
Job title: Data Engineer (AI Platform). Company: TaskUs. Focus: Outsourced digital services and next-generation customer
experience. Responsibilities: Build and maintain data ingestion pipelines for batch and streaming workloads ; Design ETL/ELT workflows for processing transcripts and metadata ; Implement data normalization, tagging, and enrichment pipelines ; Manage storage layers including S3, data lakes, and vector stores ; Enable secure, API-based access to customer data within VPC environments ; Ensure data quality, reliability, and observability across the platform. Use cases: Scalable data ingestion and transformation for AI platform ; Processing and enriching transcripts and metadata for downstream AI consumption ; Vector storage and retrieval to support GenAI/embeddings workflows ; Secure customer data access via APIs for AI-driven customer experience services.

title: System Software Engineer - AI
text:
Job title: System Software Engineer - AI. Company: Delos Data. Focus: Building infrastructure for large-scale AI data center
clusters. Responsibilities: Collaborate across the stack to influence the design of foundational technology for next-generation AI models ; Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks in distributed training and inference workloads through analysis of software-hardware interface ; Conduct rigorous performance benchmarking and characterization on multi-node clusters ; Design and implement communication and execution primitives for large-scale AI models across thousands of GPUs ; Bridge the gap between high-level AI frameworks and low-level system software. Use cases: Distributed training at scale across multi-node GPU clusters ; Inference workload optimization for large-scale AI models ; Performance optimization for AI data center infrastructure ; Communication primitives for distributed AI workloads ; GPU cluster performance benchmarking and characterization.

title: Senior Engineer II-Software AI/ML
text: Job title: Senior Engineer II-Software AI/ML. Company: Microchip Technology Inc.. Focus: Semiconductor and edge AI computing solutions. Responsibilities: Develop AI models for edge computing environments using multiple programming languages and frameworks ; Create and define AI models using TFLite, TensorFlow, ONNX, PyTorch, and C/C++ based technologies ; Design and implement AI/ML applications, models, and algorithms optimized for edge computing and cloud-based development ; Develop and tune AI models for efficient execution on hardware platforms ; Work with software engineering team to implement accelerated AI training software platforms ; Collaborate with applications engineers on data gathering, applying, and evaluating for AI models on Edge AI hardware. Use cases: Edge AI model deployment on hardware platforms ; AI applications optimized for edge computing environments ; Resource-constrained device inference ; Cloud-based AI development and application space ; Edge-to-cloud integration for AI workloads.

title: AI/ML Engineer
text: Job title: AI/ML Engineer. Company: A.P. Moller - Maersk. Focus: Global container shipping and logistics company. Responsibilities: Design, develop, and implement robust, scalable machine learning and deep learning models ; Implement best practices in security, pipeline automation, and error handling ; Research and implement new models, technologies, and methodologies into production systems ; Identify and implement data-driven approaches to solve ambiguous business problems ; Manage and optimize data solutions, perform A/B testing, and evaluate system performance ; Apply creative problem-solving to design algorithms and optimized workflows ; Contribute to design and documentation of AI/ML solutions for cross-team collaboration ; Collaborate across teams to develop scalable AI/ML solutions aligned with business goals. Use cases: Supply chain execution optimization ; Strategic decision-making support through actionable insights ; Recommendation systems for internal stakeholders and external customers ; Predictive analytics for logistics operations ; Intelligent automation of supply chain processes.

title: Senior AI/ML Engineer - Simulation
text: Job title: Senior AI/ML Engineer - Simulation. Company: A.P. Moller - Maersk. Focus: Global shipping and logistics conglomerate. Responsibilities: Develop and maintain digital twin simulations for warehouse and logistics systems, modeling system states, events, and resource interactions ; Create and optimize network models to improve flow, resource allocation, and operational performance ; Collaborate with stakeholders to integrate simulation and optimization solutions into existing workflows ; Analyze simulation outputs to pinpoint inefficiencies and recommend actionable improvements ; Write modular, testable, and efficient code to support simulation and optimization projects ; Document processes, methodologies, and findings for technical and non-technical audiences. Use cases: Digital twin simulation of warehouse and logistics systems ; Network optimization for resource allocation and operational efficiency ; Discrete-event simulation modeling of warehouse flows and resource interactions ; Predictive maintenance and anomaly detection in digital twins via ML integration ; Vehicle routing and assignment problem optimization for logistics.
gold_skills: Meta-heuristics (Tabu Search, Genetic Algorithms, Simulated Annealing)

title: Lead AI Microservices Developer
text:
Job title: Lead AI Microservices Developer. Company: Side. Focus: Global games services company providing technical and
creative services to game developers. Responsibilities: Architect and develop Python-based API microservices that call LLMs and generative models ; Design and implement AI-enabled and LLM-powered solutions for business needs ; Stay current with latest LLM technologies including OpenAI, Llama, and Gemini ; Become company expert in LLM and Generative AI API methods and Open Weights model deployment ; Collaborate with business leaders to understand requirements for business process automation ; Work with DevOps team to ensure APIs are deployed and maintained ; Integrate API microservices with other software tools across the organization. Use cases: Business process automation for game services company ; LLM-powered microservices for internal business operations ; AI-enabled solutions for gaming industry clients ; Generative AI integration across organizational tools and workflows.

title: AI Engineer, London
text: Job title: AI Engineer, London. Company: Eloquent AI. Focus: Multimodal AI operators for enterprise automation. Responsibilities: Design and build full-stack applications that power AI-driven workflows for enterprise users ; Develop high-performance front-end interfaces for AI agent control, monitoring, and visualization ; Build scalable backend services that support real-time AI interactions, knowledge retrieval, and automation ; Optimize AI-powered UIs to ensure seamless and intuitive user experiences ; Work closely with AI researchers and ML engineers to integrate LLMs, RAG, and automation into production-ready applications ; Ship robust, minimal-dependency code that performs efficiently in enterprise environments ; Continuously iterate and refine AI-driven products, balancing user needs with technical feasibility. Use cases: Automating compliance reviews for financial institutions and insurers ; Handling customer operations with intelligent, end-to-end execution ; Replacing repetitive manual tasks with AI-powered automation in regulated environments ; Executing complex workflows across fragmented tools with human-level precision ; Transforming how millions of people manage their finances through AI-driven automation.

title: AI Data Engineer
text: Job title: AI Data Engineer. Company: C the Signs. Focus: Healthcare AI for patient outcomes. Responsibilities: Collaborate with data scientists and ML engineers to understand data requirements for LLM and machine learning model fine-tuning ; Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines to ingest, process, and store massive and diverse healthcare datasets ; Implement robust data validation, cleaning, and transformation processes to ensure data quality and integrity for training datasets ; Develop and optimize data structures and schemas for efficient access and utilization by LLMs and machine learning models ; Work with the team to identify and acquire new data sources, ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations like HIPAA ; Monitor data pipeline performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement optimizations to improve efficiency and reliability. Use cases: Healthcare data processing for LLM training and fine-tuning ; Healthcare AI applications impacting patient outcomes ; Large-scale healthcare data ingestion and transformation ; Data pipeline infrastructure for machine learning workflows ; Compliant healthcare data management and storage.

title: Senior AI Ops Engineer
text:
Job title: Senior AI Ops Engineer. Company: GE Vernova. Focus: Energy technology company driving electrification and
decarbonization solutions. Responsibilities: Architect and deploy advanced AI/ML solutions to monitor, analyze, and optimize IT operations ; Automate critical processes including anomaly detection, root cause analysis, and resolution workflows using AI/ML and GenAI technology ; Lead collaboration with IT and DevOps teams to integrate AI tools into cloud and on-premise environments ; Establish, maintain, and improve data pipelines to support AI and GenAI solution applications ; Research and implement advancements in AI/ML technologies including LLMs, agentic frameworks, and embedding methodologies ; Optimize LLM performance, scalability, and cost-efficiency using techniques like model pruning, quantization, or distributed inference ; Monitor and troubleshoot production deployments to ensure model accuracy, latency, and uptime requirements are met ; Implement robust security controls for AI/ML workflows including data encryption, IAM policies, and secure API integrations. Use cases: IT infrastructure performance monitoring and optimization ; Automated anomaly detection and root cause analysis ; Predictive maintenance and proactive issue resolution ; IT operations automation and workflow optimization ; Enterprise-scale AI initiatives for energy sector applications.

title: Systems Development Engineer I (Advanced Robotics & AI Systems)
title_canonical: Systems Development Engineer I (Advanced Robotics & AI Systems)
text: Job title: Systems Development Engineer I (Advanced Robotics & AI Systems). Company: Niagara Bottling. Focus: Bottled water manufacturing and production. Responsibilities: Design and develop AI-driven perception, planning, and control systems for humanoid and quadruped robotic platforms in industrial environments ; Integrate robotics software stacks (ROS/ROS2) with edge computing, sensor fusion (LiDAR, vision, IMU), and real-time decision-making systems ; Develop and deploy machine learning models for robotic autonomy including object detection, SLAM, motion planning, and adaptive control ; Build robust, scalable data management systems and infrastructure supporting predictive analytics for manufacturing ; Develop automation frameworks for data acquisition, post-processing, and test execution from manufacturing field assets ; Perform data wrangling, cleansing, and modeling to create usable datasets for ML pipelines ; Build high-performance algorithms, predictive models, and proof of concepts for predictive maintenance ; Collaborate with cross-disciplinary teams including data architects, IT, and manufacturing information systems groups. Use cases: Predictive maintenance for manufacturing equipment using ML-driven analytics ; Autonomous robotic inspection in industrial/manufacturing environments ; Robotic material handling automation on factory floors ; Sensor fusion and real-time perception for humanoid and quadruped robots in production settings ; Data-driven process automation and optimization for bottling manufacturing ; Sim2Real robotic application prototyping and validation for manufacturing use cases.

title: Integrations Engineer, Agentic AI Platform
text: Job title: Integrations Engineer, Agentic AI Platform. Company: Trimble. Focus: Construction technology and AI solutions. Responsibilities: Serve as a technical subject matter expert on the Agentic AI Platform for customers and partners ; Educate clients on Agentic AI concepts, terminology, and use-case possibilities ; Design and implement custom technical solutions by tailoring the Agentic AI Platform to meet customer-specific needs ; Develop scripts, tools, and documentation to facilitate and streamline the integration process ; Collaborate with clients' technical teams to ensure successful deployment and adoption of the platform ; Act as a key liaison between customers and core engineering teams to translate feedback into actionable requirements. Use cases: Enterprise AI agent deployment and integration ; Customer-specific AI solution customization ; Cross-functional AI platform adoption ; AI-powered product integration ; Technical solution design for business problems ; End-to-end customer integration lifecycle support.
